listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n34:  */\n35: #define ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(COUNTER)                                                 \\\n36:   COUNTER(extension_config_missing)                                                                \\\n37:   COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n38: \n39: /**\n40:  * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n41:  */\n42: struct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n43:   ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n44: };\n45: \n46: class ListenerMessageUtil {\n47: public:\n48:   /**\n49:    * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n50:    */\n51:   static bool socketOptionsEqual(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n52:                                  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n53: \n54:   /**\n55:    * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs are the same if ignoring filter_chains field.\n56:    */\n57:   static bool filterChainOnlyChange(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n58:                                     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n59: };\n60: \n61: class ListenerManagerImpl;\n62: \n63: class ListenSocketFactoryImpl : public Network::ListenSocketFactory,\n64:                                 protected Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\n65: public:\n66:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\n67:   create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n68:          Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n69:          const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n70:          ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n71:          const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\n72: \n73:   // Network::ListenSocketFactory\n74:   Network::Socket::Type socketType() const override { return socket_type_; }\n75:   const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& localAddress() const override {\n76:     return local_address_;\n77:   }\n78:   Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\n79:   Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\n80:     return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\n81:   }\n82:   void closeAllSockets() override {\n83:     for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\n84:       socket->close();\n85:     }\n86:   }\n87:   absl::Status doFinalPreWorkerInit() override;\n88: \n89: private:\n90:   ListenSocketFactoryImpl(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n91:                           Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n92:                           Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\n93:                           const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n94:                           const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n95:                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n96:                           const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options,\n97:                           uint32_t num_sockets, absl::Status& creation_status);\n98: \n99:   ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\n100: \n101:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\n102:   createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n103:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\n104: \n105:   ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\n106:   // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\n107:   // will be set to the binding port.\n108:   Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n109:   const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n110:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\n111:   const std::string listener_name_;\n112:   const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n113:   ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\n114:   const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\n115:   // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\n116:   // 3 different cases:\n117:   // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\n118:   // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\n119:   // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\n120:   //\n121:   // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\n122:   // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\n123:   std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\n124: };\n125: \n126: // TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\n127: //                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\n128: \n129: class ListenerImpl;\n130: \n131: /**\n132:  * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\n133:  * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\n134:  */\n135: class ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\n136:                                              public Network::DrainDecision {\n137: public:\n138:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n139:                                  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n140:                                  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n141:                                  Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n142: \n143:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n144:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n145: \n146:   // DrainDecision\n147:   bool drainClose() const override {\n148:     return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\n149:   }\n150:   Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\n151:   friend class ListenerImpl;\n152: \n153: private:\n154:   const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\n155: };\n156: \n157: // TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\n158: // ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\n159: // listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\n160: class PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\n161: public:\n162:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n163:                                 ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n164:                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n165:                                 ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n166: \n167:   PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n168:       std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n169:       ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n170:       : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n171:         listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n172: \n173:   // FactoryContext\n174:   Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n175:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n176:   Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n177:   const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n178:   ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n179:   Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n180:   Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n181: \n182:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n183: \n184:   ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n185:   friend class ListenerImpl;\n186: \n187: private:\n188:   std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n189:   ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n190: };\n191: \n192: /**\n193:  * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n194:  */\n195: class ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n196:                            public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n197:                            Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\n198: public:\n199:   /**\n200:    * Create a new listener.\n201:    * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n202:    * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n203:    * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n204:    * @param name supplies the listener name.\n205:    * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n206:    * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n207:    *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n208:    * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n209:    * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n210:    */\n211:   static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n212:   create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n213:          ListenerManagerImpl& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n214:          bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n215:   ~ListenerImpl() override;\n216: \n217:   // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n218:   // update.\n219:   /**\n220:    * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n221:    * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n222:    */\n223:   absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n224:   newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n225:                              bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n226:   /**\n227:    * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n228:    */\n229:   bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n230:                                 bool worker_started);\n231: \n232:   /**\n233:    * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n234:    * listener config.\n235:    */\n236:   void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n237:                        std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n238: \n239:   /**\n240:    * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n241:    */\n242:   bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n243:   bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n244: \n245:   const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n246:     return addresses_;\n247:   }\n248:   const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n249:   const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n250:     return socket_factories_;\n251:   }\n252:   void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n253:   void initialize();\n254:   DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n255:     return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n256:   }\n257:   absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n258:   void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n259:   const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n260:     ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n261:     return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n262:   }\n263:   const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n264:   bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n265:   static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n266:                                     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n267:                                     Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n268: \n269:   // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n270:   bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n271:   // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n272:   bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n273:   // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n274:   bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n275: \n276:   // Network::ListenerConfig\n277:   Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n278:   Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n279:   std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n280:     return socket_factories_;\n281:   }\n282:   bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n283:   bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n284:   bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n285:     return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n286:   }\n287:   uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n288:     return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n289:   }\n290:   std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n291:     return listener_filters_timeout_;\n292:   }\n293:   bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n294:     return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n295:   }\n296:   Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n297:   uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n298:   const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n299:   Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n300:     return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n301:                                            : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n302:   }\n303:   Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n304:     return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n305:                                                 : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n306:   }\n307:   Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n308:   connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n309:     auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n310:     ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n311:     return *balancer->second;\n312:   }\n313:   ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n314:   const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n315:   uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n316:   uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n317:     return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n318:   }\n319:   Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n320:   bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n321:   bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n322:   const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n323:     ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n324:     return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n325:   }\n326: \n327:   void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n328:     if (options == nullptr) {\n329:       options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n330:     }\n331:   }\n332: \n333:   absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n334:   void closeAllSockets();\n335: \n336:   Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n337: \n338:   // Network::FilterChainFactory\n339:   bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n340:                                 const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n341:   bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n342:   void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n343:                                     Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n344:   bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n345: \n346:   SystemTime last_updated_;\n347: \n348: private:\n349:   ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n350:                ListenerManagerImpl& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n351:                bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n352:   struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n353:     UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n354:         : config_(config) {}\n355: \n356:     // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n357:     Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n358:     Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n359:     Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n360:     listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n361:       auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n362:       ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n363:       return *iter->second;\n364:     }\n365:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n366: \n367:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n368:     Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n369:     Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n370:     absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n371:   };\n372: \n373:   class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n374:   public:\n375:     InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n376:         : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n377: \n378:     Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n379:       return internal_listener_registry_;\n380:     }\n381: \n382:   private:\n383:     Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n384:   };\n385: \n386:   /**\n387:    * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n388:    * filter chain update is decided. Should be called only by newListenerWithFilterChain().\n389:    */\n390:   ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin, const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n391:                const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\n392:                const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started, uint64_t hash,\n393:                absl::Status& creation_status);\n394:   // Helpers for constructor.\n395:   void buildAccessLog(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n396:   absl::Status buildInternalListener(const ignore_global_conn_limit_;\n440:   const bool bypass_overload_manager_;\n441: \n442:   // A target is added to Server's InitManager if workers_started_ is false.\n443:   Init::TargetImpl listener_init_target_;\n444:   // This init manager is populated with targets from the filter chain factories, namely\n445:   // RdsRouteConfigSubscription::init_target_, so the listener can wait for route configs.\n446:   std::unique_ptr<Init::Manager> dynamic_init_manager_;\n447: \n448:   Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList listener_filter_factories_;\n449: for supporting multiple zero port addresses.\n455:   std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr> listen_socket_options_list_;\n456:   const std::chrono::milliseconds listener_filters_timeout_;\n457:   const bool continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n458:   std::shared_ptr<UdpListenerConfigImpl> udp_listener_config_;\n459:   std::unique_ptr<Network::InternalListenerConfig> internal_listener_config_;\n460:   // The key is the address string, the value is the address specific connection balancer.\n461:   // TODO (soulxu): Add hash support for address, then needn't a string address as key anymore.\n462:   absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::ConnectionBalancerSharedPtr> connection_balancers_;\n463: Per-listener connection limits are only specified via runtime.\n468:   //\n469:   // TODO (tonya11en): Move this functionality into the overload manager.\n470:   const std::string cx_limit_runtime_key_;\n471:   std::shared_ptr<BasicResourceLimitImpl> open_connections_;\n472: \n473:   // This init watcher, if workers_started_ is false, notifies the \"parent\" listener manager when\n474:   // listener initialization is complete.\n475:   // Important: local_init_watcher_ must be the last field in the class to avoid unexpected\n476:   // watcher callback during the destroy of {
  "content": "#pragma once\n\n#include <memory>\n\n#include \"envoy/access_log/access_log.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/typed_metadata.h\"\n#include \"envoy/filter/config_provider_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/drain_decision.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/filter.h\"\n#include \"envoy/network/listener.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/drain_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/filter_config.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/instance.h\"\n#include \"envoy/server/listener_manager.h\"\n#include \"envoy/stats/scope.h\"\n\n#include \"source/common/common/basic_resource_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/common/logger.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/init/target_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/filter_chain_manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_info_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/quic/quic_stat_names.h\"\n#include \"source/server/factory_context_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/server/transport_socket_config_impl.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\n\n/**\n * All missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\n#define ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(COUNTER)                                                 \\\n  COUNTER(extension_config_missing)                                                                \\\n  COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n\n/**\n * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\nstruct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n  ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n};\n\nclass ListenerMessageUtil {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n   */\n  static bool socketOptionsEqual(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                 const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs are the same if ignoring filter_chains field.\n   */\n  static bool filterChainOnlyChange(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& lhs,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& rhs);\n};\n\nclass ListenerOrchestrator;\n\nclass ListenSocketFactoryImpl : public Network::ListenSocketFactory,\n                                protected Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>>\n  create(ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n         Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n         const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n         const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets);\n\n  // Network::ListenSocketFactory\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const override { return socket_type_; }\n  const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& localAddress() const override {\n    return local_address_;\n  }\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) override;\n  Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr clone() const override {\n    return absl::WrapUnique(new ListenSocketFactoryImpl(*this));\n  }\n  void closeAllSockets() override {\n    for (auto& socket : sockets_) {\n      socket->close();\n    }\n  }\n  absl::Status doFinalPreWorkerInit() override;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                         Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n                         Network::Socket::Type socket_type,\n                         const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                         const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n                         ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n                         const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options,\n                         uint32_t num_sockets, absl::Status& creation_status);\n\n  ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone);\n\n  absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr>\n  createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(ListenerComponentFactory& factory,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index);\n\n  ListenerComponentFactory& factory_;\n  // Initially, its port number might be 0. Once a socket is created, its port\n  // will be set to the binding port.\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n  const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr options_;\n  const std::string listener_name_;\n  const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n  ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type_;\n  const Network::SocketCreationOptions socket_creation_options_;\n  // One socket for each worker, pre-created before the workers fetch the sockets. There are\n  // 3 different cases:\n  // 1) All are null when doing config validation.\n  // 2) A single socket has been duplicated for each worker (no reuse_port).\n  // 3) A unique socket for each worker (reuse_port).\n  //\n  // TODO(mattklein123): If a listener does not bind, it still has a socket. This is confusing\n  // and not needed and can be cleaned up.\n  std::vector<Network::SocketSharedPtr> sockets_;\n};\n\n// TODO(mattklein123): Consider getting rid of pre-worker start and post-worker start code by\n//                     initializing all listeners after workers are started.\n\nclass ListenerImpl;\n\n/**\n * The common functionality shared by PerListenerFilterFactoryContexts and\n * PerFilterChainFactoryFactoryContexts.\n */\nclass ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl final : public Server::FactoryContextImplBase,\n                                             public Network::DrainDecision {\npublic:\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n\n  // DrainDecision\n  bool drainClose() const override {\n    return drain_manager_->drainClose() || server_.drainManager().drainClose();\n  }\n  Server::DrainManager& drainManager();\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  const Server::DrainManagerPtr drain_manager_;\n};\n\n// TODO(lambdai): Strip the interface since ListenerFactoryContext only need to support\n// ListenerFilterChain creation. e.g, Is listenerMetaData() required? Is it required only at\n// listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\nclass PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\npublic:\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n                                ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n      std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n      ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n      : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n        listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n\n  // FactoryContext\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n  const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n  Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n  Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n  ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n};\n\n/**\n * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n */\nclass ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n                           public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n                           Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener.\n   * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n   * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n   * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n   * @param name supplies the listener name.\n   * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n   * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n   *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n   * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n   * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n         ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n         bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  ~ListenerImpl() override;\n\n  // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n  // update.\n  /**\n   * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n   * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n   */\n  absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                             bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  /**\n   * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n   */\n  bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n                                bool worker_started);\n\n  /**\n   * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n   * listener config.\n   */\n  void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n                       std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n\n  /**\n   * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n   */\n  bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n  bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n\n  const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n    return addresses_;\n  }\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n  const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n  void initialize();\n  DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n  }\n  absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n  void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n    ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n    return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n  }\n  const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n  bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n  static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n\n  // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n  bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n  bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n  bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n\n  // Network::ListenerConfig\n  Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n  Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n  bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n  bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n    return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  }\n  uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n    return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  }\n  std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n  uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n  const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n  Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n    return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n                                           : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n    return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n                                                : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n  connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n    auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n    ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n    return *balancer->second;\n  }\n  ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n  const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n  uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n  uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n    return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  }\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n  bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n  const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n    ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n  }\n\n  void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n    if (options == nullptr) {\n      options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n    }\n  }\n\n  absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n  void closeAllSockets();\n\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n\n  // Network::FilterChainFactory\n  bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n                                const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n  bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n  void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n                                    Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n  bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n\n  SystemTime last_updated_;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n              ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n              bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n  struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n    UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n        : config_(config) {}\n\n    // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n    listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n      auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n      ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n      return *iter->second;\n    }\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n    absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n  };\n\n  class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n  public:\n    InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n        : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n      return internal_listener_registry_;\n    }\n\n  private:\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n   * filter chain update is decided. Should be called only by newListenerWithFilterChain().\n   */\n  ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin, const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n              const std::string& version_info, ListenerOrchestrator& parent,\n              const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started, uint64_t hash,\n              absl::Status& creation_status);\n  // Helpers for constructor.\n  void buildAccessLog(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status buildInternalListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status validateConfig();\n  bool buildUdpListenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address,\n                                    uint32_t concurrency);\n  absl::Status buildUdpListenerFactory(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                       uint32_t concurrency);\n  void buildListenSocketOptions(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<\n                                    envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>& address_opts_list);\n  absl::Status createListenerFilterFactories(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status validateFilterChains(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status buildFilterChains(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status buildConnectionBalancer(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                       const Network::Address::Instance& address);\n  void buildSocketOptions(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  void buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  void buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config);\n  absl::Status checkIpv4CompatAddress(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address,\n                                      const envoy::config::core::v3::Address& proto_address);\n\n  void addListenSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                              const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& append_options) {\n    ensureSocketOptions(options);\n    Network::Socket::appendOptions(options, append_options);\n  }\n\n  ListenerOrchestrator& parent_;\n  std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr> addresses_;\n  const Network::Socket::Type socket_type_;\n\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr> socket_factories_;\n  const bool bind_to_port_;\n  const bool mptcp_enabled_;\n  const bool hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  const uint32_t per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  const uint64_t listener_tag_;\n  const std::string name_;\n  const bool added_via_api_;\n  const bool workers_started_;\n  const uint64_t hash_;\n  const uint32_t tcp_backlog_size_;\n  const uint32_t max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor_;\n  const bool ignore_global_conn_limit_;\n  const bool bypass_overload_manager_;\n\n  // A target is added to Server's InitManager if workers_started_ is false.\n  Init::TargetImpl listener_init_target_;\n  // This init manager is populated with targets from the filter chain factories, namely\n  // RdsRouteConfigSubscription::init_target_, so the listener can wait for route configs.\n  std::unique_ptr<Init::Manager> dynamic_init_manager_;\n\n  Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList listener_filter_factories_;\n  std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb> udp_listener_filter_factories_;\n  Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList quic_listener_filter_factories_;\n  AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector access_logs_;\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config_;\n  const std::string version_info_;\n  // Using std::vector instead of hash map for supporting multiple zero port addresses.\n  std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr> listen_socket_options_list_;\n  const std::chrono::milliseconds listener_filters_timeout_;\n  const bool continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  std::shared_ptr<UdpListenerConfigImpl> udp_listener_config_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Network::InternalListenerConfig> internal_listener_config_;\n  // The key is the address string, the value is the address specific connection balancer.\n  // TODO (soulxu): Add hash support for address, then needn't a string address as key anymore.\n  absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::ConnectionBalancerSharedPtr> connection_balancers_;\n  std::shared_ptr<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl> listener_factory_context_;\n  std::unique_ptr<FilterChainManagerImpl> filter_chain_manager_;\n  const bool reuse_port_;\n\n  // Per-listener connection limits are only specified via runtime.\n  //\n  // TODO (tonya11en): Move this functionality into the overload manager.\n  const std::string cx_limit_runtime_key_;\n  std::shared_ptr<BasicResourceLimitImpl> open_connections_;\n\n  // This init watcher, if workers_started_ is false, notifies the \\\"parent\\\" listener manager when\n  // listener initialization is complete.\n  // Important: local_init_watcher_ must be the last field in the class to avoid unexpected\n  // watcher callback during the destroy of ListenerImpl.\n  Init::WatcherImpl local_init_watcher_;\n  std::shared_ptr<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>\n      transport_factory_context_;\n\n  Quic::QuicStatNames& quic_stat_names_;\n  MissingListenerConfigStats missing_listener_config_stats_;\n\n  // to access ListenerOrchestrator::factory_.\n  friend class \"source/server/transport_socket_config_impl.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\n\n/**\n * All missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\n#define COUNTER(network_extension_config_missing)\n\n/**\n * Struct definition for all missing listener config stats. @see stats_macros.h\n */\nstruct MissingListenerConfigStats {\n  ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\n};\n\nclass ListenerMessageUtil {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * @return true if listener message lhs and rhs have the same socket options.\n   */\n Is it required only at\n// listener update or during the lifetime of listener?\nclass PerListenerFactoryContextImpl : public Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext {\npublic:\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(Envoy::Server::Instance& server,\n                                ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n                                const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config_message,\n                                ListenerImpl& listener_impl, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager);\n\n  PerListenerFactoryContextImpl(\n      std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base,\n      ListenerImpl& listener_impl)\n      : listener_factory_context_base_(listener_factory_context_base),\n        listener_impl_(listener_impl) {}\n\n  // FactoryContext\n  Network::DrainDecision& drainDecision() override;\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  Stats::Scope& scope() override;\n  const Network::ListenerInfo& listenerInfo() const override;\n  ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& messageValidationVisitor() const override;\n  Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& serverFactoryContext() const override;\n  Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContext& getTransportSocketFactoryContext() const override;\n\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override;\n\n  ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl& parentFactoryContext() { return *listener_factory_context_base_; }\n  friend class ListenerImpl;\n\nprivate:\n  std::shared_ptr<ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl> listener_factory_context_base_;\n  ListenerImpl& listener_impl_;\n};\n\n/**\n * Maps proto config to runtime config for a listener with a network filter chain.\n */\nclass ListenerImpl final : public Network::ListenerConfig,\n                           public Network::FilterChainFactory,\n                           Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::config> {\npublic:\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener.\n   * @param config supplies the configuration proto.\n   * @param version_info supplies the xDS version of the listener.\n   * @param parent supplies the owning manager.\n   * @param name supplies the listener name.\n   * @param added_via_api supplies whether the listener can be updated or removed.\n   * @param workers_started supplies whether the listener is being added before or after workers\n   *        have been started. This controls various behavior related to init management.\n   * @param hash supplies the hash to use for duplicate checking.\n   * @param concurrency is the number of listeners instances to be created.\n   */\n  static absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n         ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n         bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  ~ListenerImpl() override;\n\n  // TODO(lambdai): Explore using the same ListenerImpl object to execute in place filter chain\n  // update.\n  /**\n   * Execute in place filter chain update. The filter chain update is less expensive than full\n   * listener update because connections may not need to be drained.\n   */\n  absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\n  newListenerWithFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                             bool workers_started, uint64_t hash);\n  /**\n   * Determine if in place filter chain update could be executed at this moment.\n   */\n  bool supportUpdateFilterChain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_config,\n                                bool worker_started);\n\n  /**\n   * Run the callback on each filter chain that exists in this listener but not in the passed\n   * listener config.\n   */\n  void diffFilterChain(const ListenerImpl& another_listener,\n                       std::function<void(Network::DrainableFilterChain&)> callback);\n\n  /**\n   * Helper functions to determine whether a listener is blocked for update or remove.\n   */\n  bool blockUpdate(uint64_t new_hash) { return new_hash == hash_ || !added_via_api_; }\n  bool blockRemove() { return !added_via_api_; }\n\n  const std::vector<Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr>& addresses() const {\n    return addresses_;\n  }\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config() const { return config_; }\n  const std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& getSocketFactories() const {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  void debugLog(const std::string& message);\n  void initialize();\n  DrainManager& localDrainManager() const {\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->drainManager();\n  }\n  absl::Status addSocketFactory(Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr&& socket_factory);\n  void setSocketAndOptions(const Network::SocketSharedPtr& socket);\n  const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& listenSocketOptions(uint32_t address_index) {\n    ASSERT(listen_socket_options_list_.size() > address_index);\n    return listen_socket_options_list_[address_index];\n  }\n  const std::string& versionInfo() const { return version_info_; }\n  bool reusePort() const { return reuse_port_; }\n  static bool getReusePortOrDefault(Server::Instance& server,\n                                    const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                                    Network::Socket::Type socket_type);\n\n  // Compare whether two listeners have different socket options.\n  bool socketOptionsEqual(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener can share sockets with this listener.\n  bool hasCompatibleAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n  // Check whether a new listener has duplicated listening address this listener.\n  bool hasDuplicatedAddress(const ListenerImpl& other) const;\n\n  // Network::ListenerConfig\n  Network::FilterChainManager& filterChainManager() override { return *filter_chain_manager_; }\n  Network::FilterChainFactory& filterChainFactory() override { return *this; }\n  std::vector<Network::ListenSocketFactoryPtr>& listenSocketFactories() override {\n    return socket_factories_;\n  }\n  bool bindToPort() const override { return bind_to_port_; }\n  bool mptcpEnabled() { return mptcp_enabled_; }\n  bool handOffRestoredDestinationConnections() const override {\n    return hand_off_restored_destination_connections_;\n  }\n  uint32_t perConnectionBufferLimitBytes() const override {\n    return per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_;\n  }\n  std::chrono::milliseconds listenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  bool continueOnListenerFiltersTimeout() const override {\n    return continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_;\n  }\n  Stats::Scope& listenerScope() override { return listener_factory_context_->listenerScope(); }\n  uint64_t listenerTag() const override { return listener_tag_; }\n  const std::string& name() const override { return name_; }\n  Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef udpListenerConfig() override {\n    return udp_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *udp_listener_config_\n                                           : Network::UdpListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef internalListenerConfig() override {\n    return internal_listener_config_ != nullptr ? *internal_listener_config_\n                                                : Network::InternalListenerConfigOptRef();\n  }\n  Network::ConnectionBalancer&\n  connectionBalancer(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n    auto balancer = connection_balancers_.find(address.asString());\n    ASSERT(balancer != connection_balancers_.end());\n    return *balancer->second;\n  }\n  ResourceLimit& openConnections() override { return *open_connections_; }\n  const AccessLog::InstanceSharedPtrVector& accessLogs() const override { return access_logs_; }\n  uint32_t tcpBacklogSize() const override { return tcp_backlog_size_; }\n  uint32_t maxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent() const override {\n    return max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_;\n  }\n  Init::Manager& initManager() override;\n  bool ignoreGlobalConnLimit() const override { return ignore_global_conn_limit_; }\n  bool shouldBypassOverloadManager() const override { return bypass_overload_manager_; }\n  const Network::ListenerInfoConstSharedPtr& listenerInfo() const override {\n    ASSERT(listener_factory_context_ != nullptr);\n    return listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_->listener_info_;\n  }\n\n  void ensureSocketOptions(Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options) {\n    if (options == nullptr) {\n      options = std::make_shared<std::vector<Network::Socket::OptionConstSharedPtr>>();\n    }\n  }\n\n  absl::Status cloneSocketFactoryFrom(const ListenerImpl& other);\n  void closeAllSockets();\n\n  Network::Socket::Type socketType() const { return socket_type_; }\n\n  // Network::FilterChainFactory\n  bool createNetworkFilterChain(Network::Connection& connection,\n                                const Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList& factories) override;\n  bool createListenerFilterChain(Network::ListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n  void createUdpListenerFilterChain(Network::UdpListenerFilterManager& udp_listener,\n                                    Network::UdpReadFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\n  bool createQuicListenerFilterChain(Network::QuicListenerFilterManager& manager) override;\n\n  SystemTime last_updated_;\n\nprivate:\n  ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, const std::string& version_info,\n              ListenerOrchestrator& parent, const std::string& name, bool added_via_api,\n              bool workers_started, uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status);\n  struct UdpListenerConfigImpl : public Network::UdpListenerConfig {\n    UdpListenerConfigImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config)\n        : config_(config) {}\n\n    // Network::UdpListenerConfig\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactory& listenerFactory() override { return *listener_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& packetWriterFactory() override { return *writer_factory_; }\n    Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouter&\n    listenerWorkerRouter(const Network::Address::Instance& address) override {\n      auto iter = listener_worker_routers_.find(address.asString());\n      ASSERT(iter != listener_worker_routers_.end());\n      return *iter->second;\n    }\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig& config() override { return config_; }\n\n    const envoy::config::listener::v3::UdpListenerConfig config_;\n    Network::ActiveUdpListenerFactoryPtr listener_factory_;\n    Network::UdpPacketWriterFactoryPtr writer_factory_;\n    absl::flat_hash_map<std::string, Network::UdpListenerWorkerRouterPtr> listener_worker_routers_;\n  };\n\n  class InternalListenerConfigImpl : public Network::InternalListenerConfig {\n  public:\n    InternalListenerConfigImpl(Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry)\n        : internal_listener_registry_(internal_listener_registry) {}\n\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internalListenerRegistry() override {\n      return internal_listener_registry_;\n    }\n\n  private:\n    Network::InternalListenerRegistry& internal_listener_registry_;\n  };\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new listener from an existing listener and the new config message if the in place\n   * filter chain update is decided. creation_status)\\n96:     : factory_(factory), local_address_(address), socket_type_(socket_type), options_(options),\\n97:       listener_name_(listener_name), tcp_backlog_size_(tcp_backlog_size), Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\\n103:     }\\n104:   } else {\\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\\n111:       }\\n112:     } else {\\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\\n115:     }\\n116:   }\\n117: \\n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n121: \\n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() &&
