address to {}\\\", listener_name,\\n126:             local_address_->asString());\\n127: \\n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\\n132:     } else {\\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n136:     }\\n137:   }\\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\\n139: }\\n140: \\n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\\n155:     //\\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\\n162:   }\\n163: }\\n164: \\n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\\n174: \\n175:   // Binding is done by now.\\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\\\", listener_name_,\\n177:             local_address_->asString());\\n178:   if (socket != nullptr && options_ != nullptr) {\\n179:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\\n180:         options_, *socket, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_BOUND);\\n181:     const std::string message =\\n182:         fmt::format(\\\"{}: Setting socket options {}\\\", listener_name_, ok ? \\\"succeeded\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n183:     if (!ok) {\\n184:       ENVOY_LOG(warn, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n185:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n186:     } else {\\n187:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"{}\\\", message);\\n188:     }\\n189: \\n190:     // Add the options to the socket_ so that STATE_LISTENING options can be\\n191:     // set after listen() is called and immediately before the workers start running.\\n192:     socket->addOptions(options_);\\n193:   }\\n194:   return socket;\\n195: }\\n196: \\n197: Network::SocketSharedPtr ListenSocketFactoryImpl::getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) {\\n198:   // Per the TODO above, sockets at this point can never be null. That only happens in the\\n199:   // config validation path.\\n200:   ASSERT(worker_index < sockets_.size() && sockets_[worker_index] != nullptr);\\n201:   return sockets_[worker_index];\\n202: }\\n203: \\n204: absl::Status ListenSocketFactoryImpl::doFinalPreWorkerInit() {\\n205:   if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind ||\\n206:       socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n207:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n208:   }\\n209: \\n210:   ASSERT(!sockets_.empty());\\n211:   auto listen_and_apply_options = [](Envoy::Network::SocketSharedPtr socket, int tcp_backlog_size) {\\n212:     const auto rc = socket->ioHandle().listen(tcp_backlog_size);\\n213:     if (rc.return_value_ != 0) {\\n214:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\\"cannot listen() errno={}\\\", rc.errno_));\\n215:     }\\n216:     if (!Network::Socket::applyOptions(socket->options(), *socket,\\n217:                                        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_LISTENING)) {\\n218:       std::string message =\\n219:           fmt::format(\\\"cannot set post-listen socket option on socket: {}\\\",\\n220:                       socket->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress()->asString());\\n221:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\\n222:     }\\n223:     return absl::OkStatus();\\n224:   };\\n225:   // On all platforms we should listen on the first socket.\\n226:   auto iterator = sockets_.begin();\\n227:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n228:   ++iterator;\\n229: #ifndef WIN32\\n230:   // With this implementation on Windows we only accept\\n231:   // connections on Worker 1 and then we use the `ExactConnectionBalancer`\\n232:   // to balance these connections to all workers.\\n233:   // TODO(davinci26): We should update the behavior when socket duplication\\n234:   // does not cause accepts to hang in the OS.\\n235:   for (; iterator != sockets_.end(); ++iterator) {\\n236:     RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\\n237:   }\\n238: #endif\\n239:   return absl::OkStatus();\\n240: }\\n241: \\n242: namespace {\\n243: std::string listenerStatsScope(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\\n244:   if (!config.stat_prefix().empty()) {\\n245:     return config.stat_prefix();\\n246:   }\\n247:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n248:     return absl::StrCat(\\\"envoy_internal_\\\", config.name());\\n249:   }\\n250:   auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n251:   if (address_or_error.status().ok()) {\\n252:     return address_or_error.value()->asString();\\n253:   }\\n254:   // Listener creation will fail shortly when the address is used.\\n255:   return absl::StrCat(\\\"invalid_address_listener\\\");\\n256: }\\n257: } // namespace\\n258: \\n259: ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(\\n260:     Envoy::Server::Instance& server, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\\n261:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager)\\n262:     : Server::FactoryContextImplBase(\\n263:           server, validation_visitor, server.stats().createScope(\\\"\\\"),\\n264:           server.stats().createScope(fmt::format(\\\"listener.{}.\\\", listenerStatsScope(config))),\\n265:           std::make_shared<ListenerInfoImpl>(config)),\\n266:       drain_manager_(std::move(drain_manager)) {}\\n267: \\n268: Network::DrainDecision& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainDecision() { return *this; }\\n269: Server::DrainManager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainManager() { return *drain_manager_; }\\n270: Init::Manager& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::initManager() { return server_.initManager(); }\\n271: \\n272: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>>\\n273: ListenerImpl::create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n274:                      const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n275:                      const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n276:                      uint64_t hash) {\\n277:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\\n278:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenerImpl>(new ListenerImpl(\\n279:       config, version_info, parent, name, added_via_api, workers_started, hash, creation_status));\\n280:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\\n281:   return ret;\\n282: }\\n283: \\n284: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n285:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n286:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n287:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n288:     : parent_(parent),\\n289:       socket_type_(config.has_internal_listener()\\n290:                        ? Network::Socket::Type::Stream\\n291:                        : Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.address())),\\n292:       bind_to_port_(shouldBindToPort(config)), mptcp_enabled_(config.enable_mptcp()),\\n293:       hand_off_restored_destination_connections_(\\n294:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, use_original_dst, false)),\\n295:       per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_(\\n296:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes, 1024 * 1024)),\\n297:       listener_tag_(parent_.factory_->nextListenerTag()), name_(name),\\n298:       added_via_api_(added_via_api), workers_started_(workers_started), hash_(hash),\\n299:       tcp_backlog_size_(\\n300:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, tcp_backlog_size, ENVOY_TCP_BACKLOG_SIZE)),\\n301:       max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_(\\n302:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event,\\n303:                                           Network::DefaultMaxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent)),\\n304:       validation_visitor_(\\n305:           added_via_api_ ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor()\\n306:                          : parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\\n307:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\\n308:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\\n309:       listener_init_target_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-init-target {}\\\", name),\\n310:                             [this]() { dynamic_init_manager_->initialize(local_init_watcher_); }),\\n311:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\\n312:           fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\\\", name, hash))),\\n313:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\\n314:       listener_filters_timeout_(\\n315:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\\n316:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\\n317:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\\n318:           parent.server_, validation_visitor_, config, *this,\\n319:           parent_.factory_->createDrainManager(config.drain_type()))),\\n320:       reuse_port_(getReusePortOrDefault(parent_.server_, config, socket_type_)),\\n321:       cx_limit_runtime_key_(\\\"envoy.resource_limits.listener.\\\" + config.name() +\\n322:                             \\\".connection_limit\\\"),\\n323:       open_connections_(std::make_shared<BasicResourceLimitImpl>(\\n324:           std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(),\\n325:           listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime(), cx_limit_runtime_key_)),\\n326:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\\\", name),\\n327:                           [this] {\\n328:                             if (workers_started_) {\\n329:                               parent_.onListenerWarmed(*this);\\n330:                             } else {\\n331:                               // Notify Server that this listener is\\n332:                               // ready.\\n333:                               listener_init_target_.ready();\\n334:                             }\\n335:                           }),\\n336:       transport_factory_context_(\\n337:           std::make_shared<Server::Configuration::TransportSocketFactoryContextImpl>(\\n338:               parent_.server_.serverFactoryContext(), parent_.server_.sslContextManager(),\\n339:               listenerScope(), parent_.server_.clusterManager(), validation_visitor_)),\\n340:       quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\\n341:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\\n342:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\\n343:   std::vector<std::reference_wrapper<\\n344:       const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption>>>\\n345:       address_opts_list;\\n346:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\\n347:     addresses_.emplace_back(\\n348:         std::make_shared<Network::Address::EnvoyInternalInstance>(config.name()));\\n349:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n350:   } else {\\n351:     // All the addresses should be same socket type, so get the first address's socket type is\\n352:     // enough.\\n353:     auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\\n354:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(address_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n355:     auto address = std::move(address_or_error.value());\\n356:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.address()), creation_status);\\n357:     addresses_.emplace_back(address);\\n358:     address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n359: \\n360:     for (auto i = 0; i < config.additional_addresses_size(); i++) {\\n361:       if (socket_type_ !=\\n362:           Network::Utility::protobufAddressSocketType(config.additional_addresses(i).address())) {\\n363:         creation_status = absl::InvalidArgumentError(\\n364:             fmt::format(\\\"listener {}: has different socket type. The listener only \\\"\\n365:                         \\\"support same socket type for all the addresses.\\\",\\n366:                         name_));\\n367:         return;\\n368:       }\\n369:       auto addresses_or_error =\\n370:           Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.additional_addresses(i).address());\\n371:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(addresses_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n372:       auto additional_address = std::move(addresses_or_error.value());\\n373:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(\\n374:           checkIpv4CompatAddress(address, config.additional_addresses(i).address()),\\n375:           creation_status);\\n376:       addresses_.emplace_back(additional_address);\\n377:       if (config.additional_addresses(i).has_socket_options()) {\\n378:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(\\n379:             std::ref(config.additional_addresses(i).socket_options().socket_options()));\\n380:       } else {\\n381:         address_opts_list.emplace_back(std::ref(config.socket_options()));\\n382:       }\\n383:     }\\n384:   }\\n385: \\n386:   const absl::optional<std::string> runtime_val =\\n387:       listener_factory_context_->serverFactoryContext().runtime().snapshot().get(\\n388:           cx_limit_runtime_key_);\\n389:   if (runtime_val && runtime_val->empty()) {\\n390:     ENVOY_LOG(warn,\\n391:               \\\"Listener connection limit runtime key {} is empty. There are currently no \\\"\\n392:               \\\"limitations on the number of accepted connections for listener {}.\\\",\\n393:               cx_limit_runtime_key_, config.name());\\n394:   }\\n395: \\n396:   filter_chain_manager_ = std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n397:       addresses_, listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager()),\\n398: \\n399:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n400:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n401: \\n402:   // buildUdpListenerFactory() must come before buildListenSocketOptions() because the UDP\\n403:   // listener factory can provide additional options.\\n404:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildUdpListenerFactory(config, parent_.server_.options().concurrency()),\\n405:                            creation_status);\\n406:   buildListenSocketOptions(config, address_opts_list);\\n407:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(createListenerFilterFactories(config), creation_status);\\n408:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n409:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n410:   if (socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n411:     buildSocketOptions(config);\\n412:     buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(config);\\n413:     buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(config);\\n414:     SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n415:   }\\n416:   if (!workers_started_) {\\n417:     // Initialize dynamic_init_manager_ from Server's init manager if it's not initialized.\\n418:     // NOTE: listener_init_target_ should be added to parent's initManager at the end of the\\n419:     // listener constructor so that this listener's children entities could register their targets\\n420:     // with their parent's initManager.\\n421:     parent_.server_.initManager().add(listener_init_target_);\\n422:   }\\n423: }\\n424: \\n425: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin,\\n426:                            const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n427:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n428:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n429:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n430:     : parent_(parent), addresses_(origin.addresses_), socket_type_(origin.socket_type_),\\n431:       bind_to_port_(shouldBindToPort(config)), mptcp_enabled_(config.enable_mptcp()),\\n432:       hand_off_restored_destination_connections_(\\n433:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, use_original_dst, false)),\\n434:       per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_(\\n435:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes, 1024 * 1024)),\\n436:       listener_tag_(origin.listener_tag_), name_(name), added_via_api_(added_via_api),\\n437:       workers_started_(workers_started), hash_(hash),\\n438:       tcp_backlog_size_(\\n439:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, tcp_backlog_size, ENVOY_TCP_BACKLOG_SIZE)),\\n440:       max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_(\\n441:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event,\\n442:                                           Network::DefaultMaxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent)),\\n443:       validation_visitor_(\\n444:           added_via_api_ ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor()\\n445:                          : parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\\n446:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\\n447:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\\n448:       // listener_init_target_ is not used during in place update because we expect server started.\\n449:       listener_init_target_(\\\"\\\", nullptr),\\n450:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\\n451:           fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\\\", name, hash))),\\n452:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\\n453:       listen_socket_options_list_(origin.listen_socket_options_list_),\\n454:       listener_filters_timeout_(\\n455:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\\n456:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\\n457:       udp_listener_config_(origin.udp_listener_config_),\\n458:       connection_balancers_(origin.connection_balancers_),\\n459:       // Reuse the listener_factory_context_base_ from the origin listener because the filter chain\\n460:       // only updates will not change the listener_factory_context_base_.\\n461:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\\n462:           origin.listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_, *this)),\\n463:       filter_chain_manager_(std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n464:           addresses_, origin.listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager(),\\n465:           *origin.filter_chain_manager_)),\\n466:       reuse_port_(origin.reuse_port_),\\n467:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\\\", name),\\n468:                           [this] {\\n469:                             ASSERT(workers_started_);\\n470:                             parent_.inPlaceFilterChainUpdate(*this);\\n471:                           }),\\n472:       transport_factory_context_(origin.transport_factory_context_),\\n473:       quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\\n474:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\\n475:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\\n476:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n477:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n478:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(createListenerFilterFactories(config), creation_status);\\n479:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n480:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n481:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n482:   if (socket_type_ == Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n483:     // Apply the options below only for TCP.\\n484:     buildSocketOptions(config);\\n485:     buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(config);\\n486:     buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(config);\\n487:     open_connections_ = origin.open_connections_;\\n488:   }\\n489: }\\n490: \\n491: absl::Status\\n492: ListenerImpl::checkIpv4CompatAddress(const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr& address,\\n493:                                      const envoy::config::core::v3::Address& proto_address) {\\n494:   if ((address->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip &&\\n495:        proto_address.socket_address().ipv4_compat()) &&\\n496:       (address->ip()->version() != Network::Address::IpVersion::v6 ||\\n497:        (!address->ip()->isAnyAddress() &&\\n498:         address->ip()->ipv6()->v4CompatibleAddress() == nullptr))) {\\n499:     return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\\n500:         \\\"Only IPv6 address '::' or valid IPv4-mapped IPv6 address can set ipv4_compat: {}\\\",\\n501: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.33.0@75cca99ee9fea5a6b699af6a2124ec7404fe5d13/-/blob/source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.cc%3FL1-500\"}",

{\n46: \n47: bool anyFilterChain(\n48:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n49:     std::function<bool(const envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain&)> predicate) {\n50:   return (config.has_default_filter_chain() && predicate(config.default_filter_chain())) ||\n51:          std::any_of(config.filter_chains().begin(), config.filter_chains().end(), predicate);\n52: }\n53: \n54: bool usesProxyProto(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n55:   // Checking only the first or default filter chain is done for backwards compatibility.\n56:   const bool use_proxy_proto = PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(\n57:       config.filter_chains().empty() ? config.default_filter_chain() : config.filter_chains()[0],\n58:       use_proxy_proto, false);\n59:   if (use_proxy_proto) {\n60:     ENVOY_LOG_MISC(warn,\n61:                    \"using deprecated field 'use_proxy_proto' is dangerous as it does not respect \"\n62:                    \"listener filter order. Do not use this field and instead configure the proxy \"\n63:                    \"proto listener filter directly.\");\n64:   }\n65: \n66:   return use_proxy_proto;\n67: }\n68: \n69: bool shouldBindToPort(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n70:   return PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, bind_to_port, true) &&\n71:          PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config.deprecated_v1(), bind_to_port, true);\n72: }\n73: } // namespace\n74: \n75: absl::StatusOr<std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::create(\n76:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n77:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets) {\n81:   absl::Status creation_status = absl::OkStatus();\n82:   auto ret = std::unique_ptr<ListenSocketFactoryImpl>(new RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(creation_status);\n86:   return ret;\n87: }\n88: \n89: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(\n90:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\n91:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n92:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\n93:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\n94:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets,\n95:     absl::Status& creation_status)\n96:     : factory_(factory), local_address_(address), socket_type_(socket_type), options_(options),\n97:       listener_name_(listener_name), tcp_backlog_size_(tcp_backlog_size), bind_type_(bind_type),\n98:       socket_creation_options_(creation_options) {\n99: \n100:   if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip) {\n101:     if (socket_type == Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\n103:     }\n104:   } else {\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\n111:       }\n112:     } else {\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\n115:     }\n116:   }\n117: \n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\n121: \n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() && local_address_->ip()->port() == 0) {\n123:     local_address_ = sockets_[0]->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress();\n124:   }\n125:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Set listener {} socket factory local address to {}\", listener_name,\n126:             local_address_->asString());\n127: \n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\n132:     } else {\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\n136:     }\n137:   }\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\n139: }\n140: \n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\n155:     //\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\n162:   }\n163: }\n164: \n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\n174: \n175:   // Binding is done by now.\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\", listener_name_,\n177:             local_address_->asString());\n178:   if (socket != nullptr && options_ != nullptr) {\n179:     const bool ok = Network::Socket::applyOptions(\n180:         options_, *socket, envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_BOUND);\n181:     const std::string message =\n182:         fmt::format(\"{}: Setting socket options {}\", listener_name_, ok ? \"succeeded\" : \"failed\");\n183:     if (!ok) {\n184:       ENVOY_LOG(warn, \"{}\", message);\n185:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\n186:     } else {\n187:       ENVOY_LOG(debug, \"{}\", message);\n188:     }\n189: \n190:     // Add the options to the socket_ so that STATE_LISTENING options can be\n191:     // set after listen() is called and immediately before the workers start running.\n192:     socket->addOptions(options_);\n193:   }\n194:   return socket;\n195: }\n196: \n197: Network::SocketSharedPtr ListenSocketFactoryImpl::getListenSocket(uint32_t worker_index) {\n198:   // Per the TODO above, sockets at this point can never be null. That only happens in the\n199:   // config validation path.\n200:   ASSERT(worker_index < sockets_.size() && sockets_[worker_index] != nullptr);\n201:   return sockets_[worker_index];\n202: }\n203: \n204: absl::Status ListenSocketFactoryImpl::doFinalPreWorkerInit() {\n205:   if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind ||\n206:       socket_type_ != Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\n207:     return absl::OkStatus();\n208:   }\n209: \n210:   ASSERT(!sockets_.empty());\n211:   auto listen_and_apply_options = [](Envoy::Network::SocketSharedPtr socket, int tcp_backlog_size) {\n212:     const auto rc = socket->ioHandle().listen(tcp_backlog_size);\n213:     if (rc.return_value_ != 0) {\n214:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(fmt::format(\"cannot listen() errno={}\", rc.errno_));\n215:     }\n216:     if (!Network::Socket::applyOptions(socket->options(), *socket,\n217:                                        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_LISTENING)) {\n218:       std::string message =\n219:           fmt::format(\"cannot set post-listen socket option on socket: {}\",\n220:                       socket->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress()->asString());\n221:       return absl::InvalidArgumentError(message);\n222:     }\n223:     return absl::OkStatus();\n224:   };\n225:   // On all platforms we should listen on the first socket.\n226:   auto iterator = sockets_.begin();\n227:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\n228:   ++iterator;\n229: #ifndef WIN32\n230:   // With this implementation on Windows we only accept\n231:   // connections on Worker 1 and then we use the `ExactConnectionBalancer`\n232:   // to balance these connections to all workers.\n233:   // TODO(davinci26): We should update the behavior when socket duplication\n234:   // does not cause accepts to hang in the OS.\n235:   for (; iterator != sockets_.end(); ++iterator) {\n236:     RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(listen_and_apply_options(*iterator, tcp_backlog_size_));\n237:   }\n238: #endif\n239:   return absl::OkStatus();\n240: }\n241: \n242: namespace {\n243: std::string listenerStatsScope(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config) {\n244:   if (!config.stat_prefix().empty()) {\n245:     return config.stat_prefix();\n246:   }\n247:   if (config.has_internal_listener()) {\n248:     return absl::StrCat(\"envoy_internal_\", config.name());\n249:   }\n250:   auto address_or_error = Network::Address::resolveProtoAddress(config.address());\n251:   if (address_or_error.status().ok()) {\n252:     return address_or_error.value()->asString();\n253:   }\n254:   // Listener creation will fail shortly when the address is used.\n255:   return absl::StrCat(\"invalid_address_listener\");\n256: }\n257: } // namespace\n258: \n259: ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl(\n260:     Envoy::Server::Instance& server, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor& validation_visitor,\n261:     const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config, DrainManagerPtr drain_manager)\n262:     : Server::FactoryContextImplBase(\n263:           server, validation_visitor, server.stats().createScope(\"\"),\n264:           server.stats().createScope(fmt::format(\"listener.{}.\", listenerStatsScope(config))),\n265:           std::make_shared<ListenerInfoImpl>(config)),\n266:       drain_manager_(std::move(drain_manager)) {}\n267: \n268: Network::DrainDecision& ListenerFactoryContextBaseImpl::drainDecision() { return *this; SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n415:   }\\n416:   if (!workers_started_) {\\n417:     // Initialize dynamic_init_manager_ from Server's init manager if it's not initialized.\\n418:     // NOTE: listener_init_target_ should be added to parent's initManager at the end of the\\n419:     // listener constructor so that this listener's children entities could register their targets\\n420:     // with their parent's initManager.\\n421:     parent_.server_.initManager().add(listener_init_target_);\\n422:   }\\n423: }\\n424: \\n425: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin,\\n426:                            const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\\n427:                            const std::string& version_info, ListenerManagerImpl& parent,\\n428:                            const std::string& name, bool added_via_api, bool workers_started,\\n429:                            uint64_t hash, absl::Status& creation_status)\\n430:     : parent_(parent), addresses_(origin.addresses_), socket_type_(origin.socket_type_),\\n431:       bind_to_port_(shouldBindToPort(config)), mptcp_enabled_(config.enable_mptcp()),\\n432:       hand_off_restored_destination_connections_(\\n433:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, use_original_dst, false)),\\n434:       per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes_(\\n435:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes, 1024 * 1024)),\\n436:       listener_tag_(origin.listener_tag_), name_(name), added_via_api_(added_via_api),\\n437:       workers_started_(workers_started), hash_(hash),\\n438:       tcp_backlog_size_(\\n439:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, tcp_backlog_size, ENVOY_TCP_BACKLOG_SIZE)),\\n440:       max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event_(\\n441:           PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, max_connections_to_accept_per_socket_event,\\n442:                                           Network::DefaultMaxConnectionsToAcceptPerSocketEvent)),\\n443:       validation_visitor_(\\n444:           added_via_api_ ? parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().dynamicValidationVisitor()\\n445:                          : parent_.server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor()),\\n446:       ignore_global_conn_limit_(config.ignore_global_conn_limit()),\\n447:       bypass_overload_manager_(config.bypass_overload_manager()),\\n448:       // listener_init_target_ is not used during in place update because we expect server started.\\n449:       listener_init_target_(\\\"\\\", nullptr),\\n450:       dynamic_init_manager_(std::make_unique<Init::ManagerImpl>(\\n451:           fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-manager {} {}\\\", name, hash))),\\n452:       config_(config), version_info_(version_info),\\n453:       listen_socket_options_list_(origin.listen_socket_options_list_),\\n454:       listener_filters_timeout_(\\n455:           PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(config, listener_filters_timeout, 15000)),\\n456:       continue_on_listener_filters_timeout_(config.continue_on_listener_filters_timeout()),\\n457:       udp_listener_config_(origin.udp_listener_config_),\\n458:       connection_balancers_(origin.connection_balancers_),\\n459:       // Reuse the listener_factory_context_base_ from the origin listener because the filter chain\\n460:       // only updates will not change the listener_factory_context_base_.\\n461:       listener_factory_context_(std::make_shared<PerListenerFactoryContextImpl>(\\n462:           origin.listener_factory_context_->listener_factory_context_base_, *this)),\\n463:       filter_chain_manager_(std::make_unique<FilterChainManagerImpl>(\\n464:           addresses_, origin.listener_factory_context_->parentFactoryContext(), initManager(),\\n465:           *origin.filter_chain_manager_)),\\n466:       reuse_port_(origin.reuse_port_),\\n467:       local_init_watcher_(fmt::format(\\\"Listener-local-init-watcher {}\\\", name),\\n468:                           [this] {\\n469:                             ASSERT(workers_started_);\\n470: quic_stat_names_(parent_.quicStatNames()),\\n474:       missing_listener_config_stats_({ALL_MISSING_LISTENER_CONFIG_STATS(\\n475:           POOL_COUNTER(listener_factory_context_->listenerScope()))}) {\\n476:   buildAccessLog(config);\\n477:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateConfig(), creation_status);\\n478:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(createListenerFilterFactories(config), creation_status);\\n479:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(validateFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n480:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildFilterChains(config), creation_status);\\n481:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(buildInternalListener(config), creation_status);\\n482:   if (socket_type_ == Network::Socket::Type::Stream) {\\n483:     // Apply the options below only for TCP.\\n484:     buildSocketOptions(config);\\n485:     buildOriginalDstListenerFilter(config);\\n486:     buildProxyProtocolListenerFilter(config);\\n487:     open_connections_ = origin.open_connections_;\\n488: Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address,\\n91:     Network::Socket::Type socket_type, const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\\n92:     const std::string& listener_name, uint32_t tcp_backlog_size,\\n93:     ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type,\\n94:     const Network::SocketCreationOptions& creation_options, uint32_t num_sockets,\\n95:     absl::Status& creation_status)\\n96:     : factory_(factory), local_address_(address), socket_type_(socket_type), options_(options),\\n97:       listener_name_(listener_name), tcp_backlog_size_(tcp_backlog_size), bind_type_(bind_type),\\n98:       socket_creation_options_(creation_options) {\\n99: \\n100:   if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Ip) {\\n101:     if (socket_type == Network::Socket::Type::Datagram) {\\n102:       ASSERT(bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort || num_sockets == 1u);\\n103:     }\\n104:   } else {\\n105:     if (local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::Pipe) {\\n106:       // Listeners with Unix domain socket always use shared socket.\\n107:       // TODO(mattklein123): This should be blocked at the config parsing layer instead of getting\\n108:       // here and disabling reuse_port.\\n109:       if (bind_type_ == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort) {\\n110:         bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\\n111:       }\\n112:     } else {\\n113:       ASSERT(local_address_->type() == Network::Address::Type::EnvoyInternal);\\n114:       bind_type_ = ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind;\\n115:     }\\n116:   }\\n117: \\n118:   auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, 0);\\n119:   SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n120:   sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n121: \\n122:   if (sockets_[0] != nullptr && local_address_->ip() && local_address_->ip()->port() == 0) {\\n123:     local_address_ = sockets_[0]->connectionInfoProvider().localAddress();\\n124:   }\\n125:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Set listener {} socket factory local address to {}\\\", listener_name,\\n126:             local_address_->asString());\\n127: \\n128:   // Now create the remainder of the sockets that will be used by the rest of the workers.\\n129:   for (uint32_t i = 1; i < num_sockets; i++) {\\n130:     if (bind_type_ != ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort && sockets_[0] != nullptr) {\\n131:       sockets_.push_back(sockets_[0]->duplicate());\\n132:     } else {\\n133:       auto socket_or_error = createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(factory, socket_type, i);\\n134:       SET_AND_RETURN_IF_NOT_OK(socket_or_error.status(), creation_status);\\n135:       sockets_.push_back(*socket_or_error);\\n136:     }\\n137:   }\\n138:   ASSERT(sockets_.size() == num_sockets);\\n139: }\\n140: \\n141: ListenSocketFactoryImpl::ListenSocketFactoryImpl(const ListenSocketFactoryImpl& factory_to_clone)\\n142:     : factory_(factory_to_clone.factory_), local_address_(factory_to_clone.local_address_),\\n143:       socket_type_(factory_to_clone.socket_type_), options_(factory_to_clone.options_),\\n144:       listener_name_(factory_to_clone.listener_name_),\\n145:       tcp_backlog_size_(factory_to_clone.tcp_backlog_size_),\\n146:       bind_type_(factory_to_clone.bind_type_),\\n147:       socket_creation_options_(factory_to_clone.socket_creation_options_) {\\n148:   for (auto& socket : factory_to_clone.sockets_) {\\n149:     // In the cloning case we always duplicate() the socket. This makes sure that during listener\\n150:     // update/drain we don't lose any incoming connections when using reuse_port. Specifically on\\n151:     // Linux the use of SO_REUSEPORT causes the kernel to allocate a separate queue for each socket\\n152:     // on the same address. Incoming connections are immediately assigned to one of these queues.\\n153:     // If connections are in the queue when the socket is closed, they are closed/reset, not sent to\\n154:     // another queue. So avoid making extra queues in the kernel, even temporarily.\\n155:     //\\n156:     // TODO(mattklein123): In the current code as long as the address matches, the socket factory\\n157:     // will be cloned, effectively ignoring any changed socket options. The code should probably\\n158:     // block any updates to listeners that use the same address but different socket options.\\n159:     // (It's possible we could handle changing some socket options, but this would be tricky and\\n160:     // probably not worth the difficulty.)\\n161:     sockets_.push_back(socket->duplicate());\\n162:   }\\n163: }\\n164: \\n165: absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> ListenSocketFactoryImpl::createListenSocketAndApplyOptions(\\n166:     ListenerComponentFactory& factory, Network::Socket::Type socket_type, uint32_t worker_index) {\\n167:   // Socket might be nullptr when doing server validation.\\n168:   // TODO(mattklein123): See the comment in the validation code. Make that code not return nullptr\\n169:   // so this code can be simpler.\\n170:   absl::StatusOr<Network::SocketSharedPtr> socket_or_error = factory.createListenSocket(\\n171:       local_address_, socket_type, options_, bind_type_, socket_creation_options_, worker_index);\\n172:   RETURN_IF_NOT_OK_REF(socket_or_error.status());\\n173:   Network::SocketSharedPtr socket = std::move(*socket_or_error);\\n174: \\n175:   // Binding is done by now.\\n176:   ENVOY_LOG(debug, \\\"Create listen socket for listener {} on address {}\\\","

{

{
  "command": "python3 << 'EOF'\nimport re\n\nwith open('/tmp/listener_impl_full.cc', 'r') as f:\n    content = f.read()\n\n# Revert and do proper replacements\nwith open('/logs/agent/sessions/projects/-workspace/ad993b7d-d38f-4cff-844d-73e3581e179e/tool-results/toolu_01SsLbnAfAXyG5todqJM9Hns.txt', 'r') as f:\n    import json\n    data = json.load(f)\n    content = data['content']\n\n# Clean up the line numbers\nlines = content.split('\\n')\ncleaned_lines = []\nfor line in lines:\n    match = re.match(r'^\\d+:\\s', line)\n    if match:\n        cleaned_lines.append(line[len(match.group()):])\n    else:\n        cleaned_lines.append(line)\n\ncontent = '\\n'.join(cleaned_lines)\n\n# Now do the replacements properly\n# Replace ListenerManagerImpl& with ListenerOrchestrator&\ncontent = re.sub(r'\\bListenerManagerImpl&\\b', 'ListenerOrchestrator&', content)\n# Replace ListenerManagerImpl:: with ListenerOrchestrator::\ncontent = re.sub(r'\\bListenerManagerImpl::', 'ListenerOrchestrator::', content)\n\n# Write back\nwith open('/tmp/listener_impl_full.cc', 'w') as f:\n    f.write(content)\n\nprint(\"Replacements done successfully\")\n\n# Verify\nwith open('/tmp/listener_impl_full.cc', 'r') as f:\n    lines = f.readlines()\n    for i, line in enumerate(lines):\n        if 'Orchestrator' in line:\n            print(f\"Line {i+1}: {line.rstrip()}\")\nEOF\n"
}
Output
"Replacements done successfully"

73. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "python3 << 'EOF'\nimport re\n\n# Test the regex pattern\ntext = \"ListenerManagerImpl& parent\"\npattern = r'\\bListenerManagerImpl&\\b'\nresult = re.sub(pattern, 'ListenerOrchestrator&', text)\nprint(f\"Input: {text}\")\nprint(f\"Output: {result}\")\n\n# Check if the pattern matches\nif re.search(pattern, text):\n    print(\"Pattern matches!\")\nelse:\n    print(\"Pattern does NOT match\")\n    \n# Let's try a simpler pattern\npattern2 = r'ListenerManagerImpl&'\nresult2 = re.sub(pattern2, 'ListenerOrchestrator&', text)\nprint(f\"With simpler pattern: {result2}\")\nEOF\n"
}
Output
"Input: ListenerManagerImpl& parent\nOutput: ListenerManagerImpl& parent\nPattern does NOT match\nWith simpler pattern: ListenerOrchestrator& parent"
74. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "python3 << 'EOF'\nimport re\nimport json\n\n# Read the file\nwith open('/logs/agent/sessions/projects/-workspace/ad993b7d-d38f-4cff-844d-73e3581e179e/tool-results/toolu_01SsLbnAfAXyG5todqJM9Hns.txt', 'r') as f:\n    data = json.load(f)\n    content = data['content']\n\n# Clean up the line numbers\nlines = content.split('\\n')\ncleaned_lines = []\nfor line in lines:\n    match = re.match(r'^\\d+:\\s', line)\n    if match:\n        cleaned_lines.append(line[len(match.group()):])\n    else:\n        cleaned_lines.append(line)\n\ncontent = '\\n'.join(cleaned_lines)\n\n# Do the replacements\ncontent = content.replace('ListenerManagerImpl&', 'ListenerOrchestrator&')\ncontent = content.replace('ListenerManagerImpl::', 'ListenerOrchestrator::')\n\n# Write the file to workspace\nimport os\nos.makedirs('/workspace/source/common/listener_manager', exist_ok=True)\nwith open('/workspace/source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.cc', 'w') as f:\n    f.write(content)\n\nprint(\"File written successfully\")\n\n# Verify the replacements were made\nwith open('/workspace/source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.cc', 'r') as f:\n    lines = f.readlines()\n    for i in [273, 284, 425]:\n        print(f\"Line {i}: {lines[i-1].rstrip()}\")\nEOF\n"
}
Output
"File written successfully\nLine 273: ListenerImpl::create(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\nLine 284: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\nLine 425: ListenerImpl::ListenerImpl(ListenerImpl& origin,"

target_;\n  MockDrainManager* drain_manager_{};\n  Configuration::FactoryContext* context_{};\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplTest : public testing::TestWithParam<bool> {\npublic:\n  // reuse_port is the default on Linux for TCP. On other platforms even if set it is disabled\n  // and the user is warned. For UDP it's always the default even if not effective.\n  static constexpr ListenerComponentFactory::BindType default_bind_type =\n#ifdef __linux__\n      ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort;\n#else\n      ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\n#endif\n\nprotected:\n  ListenerManagerImplTest()\n      : listener_factory_ptr_(std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>>()),\n        listener_factory_(*listener_factory_ptr_),\n        api_(Api::createApiForTest(server_.api_.random_)), use_matcher_(GetParam()) {}\n\n  void SetUp() override {\n    ON_CALL(server_, api()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(*api_));\n    ON_CALL(*server_.server_factory_context_, api()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(*api_));\n    EXPECT_CALL(worker_factory_, createWorker_()).WillOnce(Return(worker_));\n    ON_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(validation_visitor));\n    ON_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(validation_visitor));\n    manager_ = std::make_unique<ListenerOrchestrator>(server_, std::move(listener_factory_ptr_),\n                                                      worker_factory_, enable_dispatcher_stats_,\n network_config_provider_manager_);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(&tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_));\n createListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [this](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                       filters,\n                   Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context)\n                -> Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList {\n              return THROW_OR_RETURN_VALUE(\n Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, createUdpListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(\n            Invoke([](const nextListenerTag()).WillByDefault(Invoke([this]() {\n      return listener_tag_++;\n    }));\n\n    local_address_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\"127.0.0.1\", 1234);\n    remote_address_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\"127.0.0.1\", 1234);\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, errno}));\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getsockname)\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([this](os_fd_t sockfd, sockaddr* addr, socklen_t* addrlen) {\n          return os_sys_calls_actual_.getsockname(sockfd, addr, addrlen);\n        }));\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\n                                   const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\n          return os_sys_calls_actual_.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\n        }));\n    socket_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<Network::MockConnectionSocket>>();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * This routing sets up an expectation that does various things:\n   * 1) Allows us to track listener destruction via filter factory destruction.\n   * 2) Allows us to register for init manager handling much like RDS, etc. would do.\n   * 3) Stores the factory context for later use.\n   * 4) Creates a mock local drain manager for the listener.\n   */\n  ListenerHandle* expectListenerCreate(bool need_init, bool added_via_api,\n                                       envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DrainType drain_type =\n                                           envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DEFAULT) {\n    if (added_via_api) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor());\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n    }\n    auto raw_listener = new ListenerHandle();\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createDrainManager_(drain_type))\n        .WillOnce(Return(raw_listener->drain_manager_));\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillOnce(Invoke(\n            [raw_listener, need_init](\n                const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>&,\n                Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) {\n              std::shared_ptr<ListenerHandle> notifier(raw_listener);\n              raw_listener->context_ = &filter_chain_factory_context;\n              if (need_init) {\n                filter_chain_factory_context.initManager().add(notifier->target_);\n              }\n\n              Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList factories;\n              factories.push_back(\n                  std::make_unique<Config::TestExtensionConfigProvider<Network::FilterFactoryCb>>(\n                      [notifier](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {}));\n              return factories;\n            }));\n\n    return raw_listener;\n  }\n\n  ListenerHandle* expectListenerOverridden(bool need_init, ListenerHandle* origin = nullptr) {\n    auto raw_listener = new ListenerHandle(false);\n    // Simulate ListenerImpl: drain manager is copied from origin.\n    if (origin != nullptr) {\n      raw_listener->drain_manager_ = origin->drain_manager_;\n    }\n    // Overridden listener is always added by api.\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillOnce(Invoke(\n            [raw_listener, need_init](\n                const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>&,\n                Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) {\n              std::shared_ptr<ListenerHandle> notifier(raw_listener);\n              raw_listener->context_ = &filter_chain_factory_context;\n              if (need_init) {\n                filter_chain_factory_context.initManager().add(notifier->target_);\n              }\n\n              Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList factories;\n              factories.push_back(\n                  std::make_unique<Config::TestExtensionConfigProvider<Network::FilterFactoryCb>>(\n                      [notifier](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {}));\n              return factories;\n            }));\n\n    return raw_listener;\n  }\n\n  const Network::FilterChain*\n  findFilterChain(uint16_t destination_port, const std::string& destination_address,\n                  const std::string& server_name, const std::string& transport_protocol,\n                  const std::vector<std::string>& application_protocols,\n                  const std::string& source_address, uint16_t source_port,\n                  std::string direct_source_address = \"\") {\n    if (absl::StartsWith(destination_address, \"/\")) {\n      local_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(destination_address);\n    } else {\n      local_address_ =\n          Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(destination_address, destination_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(local_address_);\n\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setRequestedServerName(server_name);\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, requestedServerName()).WillByDefault(Return(absl::string_view(server_name)));\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, detectedTransportProtocol())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(absl::string_view(transport_protocol)));\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, requestedApplicationProtocols())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(application_protocols));\n\n    if (absl::StartsWith(source_address, \"/\")) {\n      remote_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(source_address);\n    } else {\n      remote_address_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(source_address, source_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setRemoteAddress(remote_address_);\n\n    if (direct_source_address.empty()) {\n      direct_source_address = source_address;\n    }\n    if (absl::StartsWith(direct_source_address, \"/\")) {\n      direct_remote_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(direct_source_address);\n    } else {\n      direct_remote_address_ =\n          Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(direct_source_address, source_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setDirectRemoteAddressForTest(direct_remote_address_);\n\n    return manager_->listeners().back().get().filterChainManager().findFilterChain(*socket_,\n                                                                                    stream_info_);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Validate that createListenSocket is called once with the expected options.\n   */\n  void\n  expectCreateListenSocket(const envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::SocketState& expected_state,\n                           Network::Socket::Options::size_type expected_num_options,\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type = default_bind_type,\n                           uint32_t worker_index = 0) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, bind_type, _, worker_index))\n        .WillOnce(\n            Invoke([this, expected_num_options, &expected_state](\n                       const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&, Network::Socket::Type,\n                       const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                       ListenerComponentFactory::BindType, const Network::SocketCreationOptions&,\n                       uint32_t) -> Network::SocketSharedPtr {\n              EXPECT_NE(options.get(), nullptr);\n              EXPECT_EQ(options->size(), expected_num_options);\n              EXPECT_TRUE(Network::Socket::applyOptions(options, *listener_factory_.socket_,\n                                                        expected_state));\n              return listener_factory_.socket_;\n            }))\n        .RetiresOnSaturation();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Validate that setSocketOption() is called the expected number of times with the expected\n   * options.\n   */\n  void expectSetsockopt(int expected_sockopt_level, int expected_sockopt_name, int expected_value,\n                        uint32_t expected_num_calls = 1) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_,\n                setSocketOption(expected_sockopt_level, expected_sockopt_name, _, sizeof(int)))\n        .Times(expected_num_calls)\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke(\n            [expected_value](int, int, const void* optval, socklen_t) -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n              EXPECT_EQ(expected_value, *static_cast<const int*>(optval));\n              return {0, 0};\n            }));\n  }\n\n  void checkStats(int line_num, uint64_t added, uint64_t modified, uint64_t removed,\n                  uint64_t warming, uint64_t active, uint64_t draining,\n                  uint64_t draining_filter_chains) {\n    SCOPED_TRACE(line_num);\n\n    EXPECT_EQ(added, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_added\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(modified, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_modified\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(removed, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_removed\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(warming, server_.stats_store_\n                           .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_warming\",\n                                  Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                           .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(active, server_.stats_store_\n                          .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_active\",\n                                 Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                          .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(draining, server_.stats_store_\n                            .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_draining\",\n                                   Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                            .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(draining_filter_chains, server_.stats_store_\n                                          .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_filter_chains_draining\",\n                                                 Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                                          .value());\n  }\n\n  void checkConfigDump(\n      const std::string& expected_dump_yaml,\n      const Matchers::StringMatcher& name_matcher = Matchers::UniversalStringMatcher()) {\n    auto message_ptr =\n        server_.admin_.config_tracker_.config_tracker_callbacks_[\"listeners\"](name_matcher);\n    const auto& listeners_config_dump =\n        dynamic_cast<const envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump&>(*message_ptr);\n    envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump expected_listeners_config_dump;\n    TestUtility::loadFromYaml(expected_dump_yaml, expected_listeners_config_dump);\n    EXPECT_EQ(expected_listeners_config_dump.DebugString(), listeners_config_dump.DebugString());\n  }\n\n  bool addOrUpdateListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                           const std::string& version_info = \"\", bool added_via_api = true) {\n    // Automatically inject a matcher that always matches \"foo\" if not present.\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener;\n    listener.MergeFrom(config);\n    if (use_matcher_ && !listener.has_filter_chain_matcher()) {\n      const std::string filter_chain_matcher = R\"EOF(\n        matcher_tree:\n          input:\n            name: port\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n          exact_match_map:\n            map:\n              \"10000\":\n                action:\n                  name: foo\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: foo\n        on_no_match:\n          action:\n            name: foo\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n              value: foo\n      )EOF\";\n      TestUtility::loadFromYaml(filter_chain_matcher, *listener.mutable_filter_chain_matcher());\n    }\n    auto status_or_error = manager_->addOrUpdateListener(listener, version_info, added_via_api);\n    if (status_or_error.status().ok()) {\n      return status_or_error.value();\n    }\n    throw EnvoyException(std::string(status_or_error.status().message()));\n  }\n\n  void testListenerUpdateWithSocketOptionsChange(const std::string& origin,\n                                                 const std::string& updated,\n                                                 bool multiple_addresses = false) {\n    InSequence s;\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n    ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n    auto socket = std::make_shared<testing::NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>>();\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_origin = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    if (multiple_addresses) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .Times(2)\n          .WillRepeatedly(Return(socket));\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    }\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_origin->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(origin)));\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    listener_origin->target_.ready();\n    worker_->callAddCompletion();\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_updated = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    if (multiple_addresses) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .Times(2)\n          .WillRepeatedly(Return(socket));\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    }\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_updated->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(updated)));\n\n    // Should be both active and warming now.\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners(ListenerManager::WARMING).size());\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners(ListenerManager::ACTIVE).size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_updated, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_origin, onDestroy());\n  }\n\n  void testListenerUpdateWithSocketOptionsChangeRejected(const std::string& origin,\n                                                         const std::string& updated,\n                                                         const std::string& message) {\n    InSequence s;\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n    ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n    auto socket = std::make_shared<testing::NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>>();\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_origin = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n        .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_origin->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(origin)));\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    listener_origin->target_.ready();\n    worker_->callAddCompletion();\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_updated = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_updated, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(updated)), EnvoyException,\n                              message);\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_origin, onDestroy());\n  }\n\n  NiceMock<Api::MockOsSysCalls> os_sys_calls_;\n  TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_{&os_sys_calls_};\n  Api::OsSysCallsImpl os_sys_calls_actual_;\n  NiceMock<MockInstance> server_;\n  class DumbInternalListenerRegistry : public Singleton::Instance,\n                                       public Network::InternalListenerRegistry {\n  public:\n    MOCK_METHOD(Network::LocalInternalListenerRegistry*, getLocalRegistry, ());\n  };\n  std::shared_ptr<DumbInternalListenerRegistry> internal_registry_{\n      std::make_shared<DumbInternalListenerRegistry>()};\n\n  std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>> listener_factory_ptr_;\n  NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>& listener_factory_;\n  NiceMock<ProtobufMessage::MockValidationVisitor> validation_visitor;\n  MockWorker* worker_ = new MockWorker();\n  NiceMock<MockWorkerFactory> worker_factory_;\n  std::unique_ptr<ListenerOrchestrator> manager_;\n  NiceMock<MockGuardDog> guard_dog_;\n  Event::SimulatedTimeSystem time_system_;\n  Api::ApiPtr api_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr remote_address_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr direct_remote_address_;\n  NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Network::MockConnectionSocket> socket_;\n  uint64_t listener_tag_{1};\n  bool enable_dispatcher_stats_{false};\n  NiceMock<testing::MockFunction<void()>> callback_;\n  // Test parameter indicating whether the unified filter chain matcher is enabled.\n  bool use_matcher_;\n  Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl network_config_provider_manager_;\n  Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n  Filter::QuicListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl quic_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n};\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n\"\"\"\n\nos.makedirs('/workspace/test/common/listener_manager', exist_ok=True)\nwith open('/workspace/test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_test.h', 'w') as f:\n    f.write(test_h_content)\n\nprint(\"File written successfully\")\n\n# Verify the changes\nwith {lines[83]}\")\n    # Check line 477\n    print(f\"Line 477: {lines[476]}\")\nEOF\n"
